userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: User profile settings, sizing calibrations, wishlisted items (savedProductIds), and styling preferences.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

isAdmin.description: True if the user has administrative privileges.

height.description: The current tall height of the user, e.g. 6'2.

bodyType.description: The physical body morph type (Lean, Athletic, Broad, Heavy).

cardSize.description: The layout density preference for browsing cards (small, medium, large).

savedProductIds.description: List of wishlisted or saved product document identifiers for the user.

savedFitIds.description: List of saved lookbook or full kit identifiers.

preferences.description: Nested map of brand arrays, occasion focuses, and general configurations.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of the last calibration update.

product.title: Product
product.description: Affiliate-linked garment curated with precise measurements and fit verdicts.

title.description: Standard display title of the garment.

category.description: Broad clothing category (Ethnic Wear, Formals, Streetwear, etc.)

subCategory.description: Detailed segment (e.g. Shirts, Kurtas, Blazers, Hoodies).

images.description: URLs of visual reference photographs of the garment.

occasions.description: Target style context (Wedding, Office, Date Night, Casual).

priceAtRetailer.description: Standard numerical listing price in Indian Rupees.

measurements.description: Drawn tailoring measurements (chest, sleeve, rise, inseam, length).

verdicts.description: Fit ratings map for height segments.

outOfStock.description: True if the item is out of stock.

merchantLinks.description: Optional list of secondary outlet links (e.g. Amazon, Flipkart) with prices.

reviewsCount.description: Total user review submission records counts.

customReviews.description: Optional list of reviews written by tall customers.

/users/{userId}.description: Durable collection of unique user profiles keyed by user accounts.

/products/{productId}.description: Curated garment directory with height-suitability verdicts.
